hero_subtitle: SFTY helps VASPs connect KYC, KYB, sanctions and risk signals into a unified onboarding workflow with audit-ready evidence and case management for corporate clients.
trust_card_1_value: Identity checks connected to onboarding decisions
trust_card_2_value: Corporate verification, UBO review and entity risk
trust_card_3_value: Wallet and transaction monitoring in one workflow
trust_card_4_value: Message routing, completeness checks and exception handling
trust_card_5_value: Regulatory changes mapped to internal rule
trust_card_6_value: Decision logs and evidence for every review
problem_title: Onboarding slows when checks remain disconnected
problem_description: VASPs face fragmented workflows as KYB, sanctions, PEP, and adverse media screening outputs stay isolated across providers. This creates manual work, inconsistent risk views, and weak audit trails that hinder clear corporate onboarding decisions and regulatory review readiness.
problem_point_1_value: KYC, KYB, KYT and Travel Rule outputs sit in separate tools
problem_point_2_value: Teams move data between dashboards, spreadsheets and internal notes
problem_point_3_value: Regulatory changes are hard to map into internal workflows
problem_point_4_value: Evidence and decision history are difficult to reconstruct later
solution_description: SFTY integrates KYB, sanctions, PEP and adverse media data into a unified onboarding workflow that centralizes risk views, documents decisions and preserves audit evidence for consistent corporate onboarding reviews.
workflow_title: From KYB checks to onboarding approval
workflow_description: SFTY connects KYB and KYC provider results with risk rules, screening, manual review and decision evidence to deliver structured onboarding approval workflows.
workflow_step_1_description: KYC, KYB, KYT and screening outputs enter SFTY
workflow_step_2_description: Risk rules route checks into the right workflow
workflow_step_3_description: A case opens with customer, wallet and provider context
workflow_step_4_description: Teams review, decide and record the outcome
workflow_step_5_description: Logs, decisions and reports stay ready for audit
why_sfty_title: Beyond fragmented checks. One onboarding control
why_sfty_description: SFTY connects KYC and KYB outputs into structured review workflows, decision evidence and audit-ready onboarding trails without replacing existing providers or disrupting operations.
why_sfty_card_1_description: Work above existing KYC, KYB, KYT and Travel Rule tools
why_sfty_card_2_description: Turn disconnected outputs into structured reviews and cases
why_sfty_card_3_description: Preserve evidence, reviewer actions and decision history
why_sfty_card_4_description: Give compliance, risk and leadership one operating view
authority_description: SFTY delivers a controlled compliance layer that preserves audit evidence, enforces provider orchestration and supports secure enterprise deployment for onboarding corporate clients.
authority_card_1_description: Connect KYC, KYB, KYT, Travel Rule and screening providers into one workflow
authority_card_2_description: Preserve provider outputs, reviewer notes, decisions and supporting records
authority_card_3_description: Prepare clearer compliance evidence for banks, partners and external review
authority_card_4_description: Support private environments, permissions, integrations and internal governance
ask_sfty_placeholder: How can SFTY support corporate onboarding workflows for VASPs
ask_sfty_chip_1_message: Explain how KYB provider outputs feed onboarding risk reviews
ask_sfty_chip_2_message: Show how onboarding decisions are preserved with audit evidence
ask_sfty_chip_3_message: Describe how SFTY manages sanctions and PEP screening integration
ask_sfty_helper_text: AI assistant for product, deployment and compliance questions
faq_description: Clear answers on provider orchestration, Travel Rule workflows, audit evidence and enterprise compliance operations.
faq_1_question: What is SFTY for VASP corporate onboarding?
faq_1_answer: SFTY provides VASPs with a compliance layer connecting corporate onboarding checks, risk screening, sanctions, PEP, UBO reviews and provider outputs into structured, auditable workflows.
faq_2_question: How does SFTY orchestrate KYB and risk checks?
faq_2_answer: SFTY applies internal policies to orchestrate selected KYC and KYB providers, routing checks by jurisdiction, client risk and product type into consistent corporate onboarding reviews and cases.
faq_3_question: How does SFTY preserve onboarding audit evidence?
faq_3_answer: SFTY preserves case history, decision logs and supporting evidence for onboarding, supporting audit-ready records that link risk decisions, provider results and regulatory rule triggers.
faq_4_question: Can SFTY integrate with existing KYC and KYB tools?
faq_4_answer: Yes. SFTY integrates with multiple KYC, KYB and screening providers, connecting their outputs into one operational compliance workflow without disrupting existing provider relationships.
faq_5_question: Does SFTY replace KYC or KYB providers?
faq_5_answer: No. SFTY sits above existing KYC and KYB providers, turning their outputs into structured workflows rather than replacing them.
final_title: Structure corporate onboarding with audit-ready workflows
final_description: Review how SFTY connects KYC, KYB, sanctions and risk data into connected, controlled onboarding cases and evidence for VASPs.
footer_description: Supervisory and compliance control layer for digital asset markets, businesses and regulated institutions.

footer_legal_notice: This page is for informational purposes only and does not constitute legal, regulatory or compliance advice. SFTY deployment depends on jurisdiction, client requirements and applicable laws.
